title: Design System: Virtual Software Dev Team

body.purpose: All reading text, message content, form labels

title.purpose: Section headers, agent names, conversation titles

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button using Deep Violet.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #818cf8; color: #fff; padding: 8px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6366f1; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #27272a; color: #71717a; cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.7; }

components.name: Send Button
components.css: .ds-btn-send { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 24px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; min-height: 40px; transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.1s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-btn-send.active { background: #4f46e5; color: white; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.4); } .ds-btn-send.active:hover { background: #4338ca; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.5); }

components.name: Chat Input
components.description: Pill-shaped chat input with indigo focus glow.
components.css: .ds-input-wrapper { background: #18181b; border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); } .ds-input-wrapper:focus-within { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.4), 0 4px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); } .ds-input-chat { width: 100%; background: transparent; border: none; padding: 20px 24px; min-height: 64px; resize: none; outline: none; font-size: 16px; color: #fafafa; line-height: 1.5; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif; } .ds-input-chat::placeholder { color: #71717a; }

components.name: Form Input
components.css: .ds-form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; background: #111113; border: 1px solid #27272a; border-radius: 8px; color: #fafafa; font-size: 13px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3a3a3a; }

components.name: Agent Message
components.description: Agent chat message with role color indicator.
components.html:
Product Manager
分析了需求之后，我建议采用模块化架构...
components.css: .ds-msg-agent { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-msg-indicator { width: 3px; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-msg-body { flex: 1; } .ds-msg-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-msg-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #fafafa; } .ds-msg-content { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; color: #e5e5e5; word-wrap: break-word; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.css: .ds-status-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 11px; color: #a1a1aa; } .ds-status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #34d399; } .ds-status-dot.working { background: #fbbf24; animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-status-dot.working { animation: none; opacity: 0.7; } }

narrative.overview: A dark-first collaborative workstation for AI agent orchestration. The interface communicates 'a team is at work for you' rather than 'you are chatting with a bot.' Every visual choice reinforces the sense of structured, multi-role collaboration: the sidebar panels group agents by team, the chat shows role-colored messages, the workspace panel separates outputs by type. The system uses a refined dark palette with low chroma neutrals and one vivid accent (Deep Violet) for interactive surfaces. It explicitly rejects the generic AI chatbot aesthetic (pure chat, no structure, single conversation stream) in favor of a tool-like layout with multiple information zones.
keyCharacteristics: Low-chroma neutrals with precise color accents per role
Restrained motion: state transitions only, no decorative animation
Flat-by-default surfaces with tonal elevation instead of heavy shadows

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest have no shadow. Shadows appear only on floating elements. Depth is communicated by tonal stepping, not by elevation shadows.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Deep Violet is used for exactly one primary action per view. Its rarity is the point.

dos: Do use tonal layering to convey hierarchy instead of shadows.
Do use Deep Violet for exactly one primary action per view.
Do keep the chat input pill-shaped (20px radius) with the indigo focus glow.
Do use the 4px spacing scale consistently.
Do use the system font stack for CJK support.
Do provide hover states for all interactive elements.
donts: Don't use drop shadows on static surfaces.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, decorative blur, or stripe backgrounds.
Don't use the AI chatbot pure-chat aesthetic.
Don't place more than one Deep Violet button per viewport area.
Don't use border-radius larger than 12px for cards or containers.
Don't hard-code colors. Use the custom property tokens.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing.
